text: Standing in this modern, sterile corridor, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and detachment. The glass, the clean lines, the fire safety paraphernalia—all seem to signal order and utility, yet they also suggest a careful, calculated containment of experience. As I enter the R+D exhibit, the space transforms into a playground for ideas. I am struck by the invitation to reflect on the interconnection of humans and intelligent machines. The mixture of vibrant color and glowing screens stimulates my curiosity. I feel both inspired and slightly unsettled by how intellectual exploration is curated and choreographed here, as if innovation itself were on display behind glass.
